items.title: Lebanon thought there was a ceasefire - then Israel unleashed deadly blitz
items.dek: Israel says Lebanon is not included in the ceasefire the US agreed to halt the war with Iran.
items.body: Israel says Lebanon is not included in the ceasefire the US agreed to halt the war with Iran.

items.title: 'Endless fears': Even if fighting stops, the damage to Iran's children will endure
items.dek: The BBC has been able to obtain testimony from parents and those trying to help children deal with the distress that comes with war.
items.body: The BBC has been able to obtain testimony from parents and those trying to help children deal with the distress that comes with war.
